personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer Tech Lead | AWS, Python, SQL, ETL & Data Quality

summary: Senior Data Engineer / Tech Lead with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience designing, building, testing, and supporting scalable data pipelines, data warehouse workflows, analytics datasets, and operational reporting systems. Strong hands-on background in AWS data platform patterns, Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, ETL/ELT, data quality, governance-aware delivery, production troubleshooting, and stakeholder communication. Experienced translating complex source data into reliable analytical products, resolving production incidents, documenting data processes, and helping teams build repeatable, maintainable data solutions.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Built scalable data processing workflows using Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Oracle, and reporting layers to support analytics, forecasting, and operational insights.
Designed AWS-oriented data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, Glue-based ETL, Athena-style lake access, and Redshift analytics for curated reporting and forecasting workloads.
Analyzed complex infrastructure and application telemetry sources to determine business value, quality risks, and appropriate inclusion in analytical and forecasting processes.
Implemented data cleansing, validation, reconciliation, and troubleshooting routines to improve accuracy, completeness, and reliability of production datasets.
Tested data movement, transformation logic, and reporting components to confirm pipeline correctness before recurring operational use.
Tuned SQL queries, storage structures, and pipeline workflows to improve performance, scalability, and maintainability of analytics delivery.
Resolved production data defects and incidents by tracing issues across source feeds, transformations, reporting datasets, and downstream stakeholder outputs.
Created technical documentation, operational procedures, data definitions, and support notes to improve maintainability and knowledge transfer across teams.
Provided guidance and repeatable patterns to help team members support ongoing data engineering, reporting, and performance-analysis workflows.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for critical revenue-generating hospitality systems.
Built analytics and reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and production troubleshooting.
Collaborated with technical teams during AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, visibility gaps, and operational support needs.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, client training materials, and knowledge-sharing content for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and support workflows.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap usage, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for production release decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to ensure integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT Pipelines, Data Transformation, Data Movement Testing, Data Cleansing, Data Quality, Data Validation, Reconciliation, Analytics Data Products
skills.Cloud Data Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Data Lake Patterns, Cloud Data Pipeline Architecture, Databricks Concepts
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.Data Management: Data Governance, Data Security Awareness, Data Quality Controls, Data Modeling, Data Warehouse Patterns, Documentation, Data Definitions
skills.Databases & Warehousing: Oracle, Oracle RAC, Redshift, PostgreSQL, MySQL, DB2, Snowflake Concepts, Teradata Concepts, Relational Database Design
skills.Production Support: Incident Resolution, Defect Analysis, Root Cause Analysis, Pipeline Troubleshooting, Monitoring, Alerting, Operational Support, Performance Tuning
skills.Testing & Delivery: Transformation Testing, Data Component Testing, Code Review, Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Agile Collaboration, Release-in-Small-Batches Mindset
skills.Leadership: Tech Lead Support, Mentorship, Knowledge Sharing, End-User Education, Business Partner Communication, Cross-Team Collaboration
skills.Analytics & AI/ML: BI Dataset Preparation, Machine Learning Data Support, Capacity Forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, Streamlit, Executive Reporting
skills.Adjacent / Learning: Ab Initio Concepts, Databricks, Snowflake, Teradata, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Modern Data Engineering Practices

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into validated forecasting datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers for semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, structured artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking.
